Oh my god this is beautiful 😭😭😭

okay not putting tags since I already post one in chinese.Still, I am posting R18+ stuff .Doresain top

Doresain was supposed to be at the ball.
Yet when Pickman and Sanga sneaked into the kitchen, they found him already standing at the doorway, as if he had been waiting there all along.

Pickman’s eyes widened, his voice cracking into a startled cry.
“Wait a minute! Aren’t you supposed to be at the ball?! What are you doing here?!”

Doresain simply regarded them, his gaze unreadable—somewhere between weary amusement and something softer, indulgent.
“Because I knew you wouldn’t let it go. That’s why I waited here.”

His eyes then shifted to Sanga, lips curving in a faint smile.
“So… this is your accomplice?”

Sanga laughed openly, with no attempt to hide herself.
“Heh, well, this was his idea.”

“That’s right!” Pickman immediately straightened up, trying to look dignified though his voice trembled. “It’s all for the sake of art! For the sake of my masterpiece!”

Doresain shook his head, a sigh slipping into a chuckle.
“So brazen about stealing… I must say, that’s rare.”

Pickman grew flustered, rushing forward with wide, pleading eyes, like a desperate pup trying to curry favor.
“Please, Doresain! Just give me your ingredients!”

“That won’t work on me.” Doresain’s tone was calm, but inside, something stirred. Those damp, imploring eyes—he dared not look too long, for fear he would drown in them.

Pickman puffed out his cheeks in frustration, muttering, “You’re so cruel… can’t even lend me something for my painting.”

Doresain smiled faintly, stepping closer, lowering his voice as he leaned in.
“Why do I sound like the villain in your story?”

“Hmph!” Pickman turned his head away, but the tips of his ears were flushed red. “Don’t get the wrong idea—I’m only doing this for art!”
thread_title: doresain x pickman fan fic R18

content:
“For art, hmm…” Doresain chuckled lowly, and his eyes flickered with something unspoken.
“Then how will you compensate me?”

Pickman froze, his heart skipping violently.
“Com—compensate? I didn’t even do anything wrong…”

Sanga couldn’t hold back her laughter, clearly entertained.
“Heh, didn’t know you were so favored, Pickman.”

“Wha—what do you mean?! Don’t say weird stuff like that!” Pickman’s face burned scarlet, flustered and helpless.

Doresain’s hand lifted, fingers gently but firmly tilting his chin upward. The touch was not rough, but it left Pickman unable to move. His voice remained elegant, yet the undercurrent was unmistakably heated.
“Don’t you always shout ‘for art’? Then let me create a piece of art—on your body.”

Pickman’s breath hitched, his heart hammering wildly in his chest. His face flushed hot, voice breaking.
“On—on my body?! How is that compensation?!”

“The most sincere kind,” Doresain smiled, his tone smooth, like a predator tightening its snare. “Paint fades. But the canvas remembers.”

“I don’t want to be your canvas!” Pickman struggled, shouting, but Sanga was already quietly retreating toward the door.

“You two seem busy, so I’ll leave you to it,” she teased, waving before slipping outside.

“Sanga?! Don’t leave me alone with him!” Pickman panicked, but his cry was met only with Doresain’s low, velvety laugh.

“Don’t move.” His fingertips ghosted along Pickman’s arm—soft as a feather, yet with the weight of a brushstroke.
“I am, after all, a meticulous artist.”

—

Soon, the scene shifted to the bedroom. Candlelight flickered, carrying the scent of burning wood.

Pickman was half-pushed, half-dragged to the bed, sitting down with wide, wary eyes.
“I’m warning you… don’t try anything weird!”
thread_title: doresain x pickman fan fic R18

content:
Doresain unfastened his coat with deliberate grace, hanging it neatly over the chair. Every movement was calm, controlled, radiating quiet dominance.
“Relax. I know my limits. I only ask that you give yourself to me—just for a little while.”

“You make it sound like I’m food!” Pickman shot back, puffing up in anger.

Doresain merely smiled, placing his sketchbook at the head of the bed.
“Since you always insist it’s ‘for art,’ then prove it—in the most honest way.”

Pickman’s back pressed hard against the headboard, cheeks blazing. His voice came out stammered, panicked.
“Don’t—don’t come so close! I—I won’t cooperate with you!”

Doresain leaned in, his fingers brushing Pickman’s collar as though outlining lines.
“You don’t have a choice, do you? By reason, you stole from me first. By force… do you really want to try? And don’t forget the punishment last time.”

Pickman shuddered, his bravado crumbling.

“Good.” Doresain’s lips curved faintly, as though everything was already within his grasp. “Why not enjoy it instead? Who knows—you may even like it.”

As his words fell, his fingers deftly slipped open the buttons of Pickman’s shirt. In the flickering glow, pale skin emerged, like a canvas waiting to be unveiled.

—

On the bedside table lay a porcelain dish. Inside, berries and honey mixed with something darker, forming a crimson liquid.

Doresain dipped his fingertip, trailing the cool touch across Pickman’s collarbone in a slow arc.

“Ugh! That tickles! Stop it already—!” Pickman twisted, his voice trembling, ears red to their tips.

Doresain chuckled softly, one hand steady on his shoulder—not harsh, yet impossible to resist.
“Patience. That’s exactly the effect I want.”

Sweet berry fragrance mingled with body heat. Lowering his head, Doresain’s lips brushed the line he had drawn, tongue carefully licking, swallowing the stain bit by bit.

Pickman stiffened, his breath ragged.
“A-are you… licking me?!”
thread_title: doresain x pickman fan fic R18

content:
“Of course.” Doresain lifted his gaze, a gentleman’s smile carrying dangerous warmth.
“Food should always be tasted.”

He bit lightly at Pickman’s shoulder, leaving a mark, then soothed it with his tongue, teeth grazing the skin just enough to send shivers down Pickman’s spine.

“Don’t eat me! I don’t want to end up in your stomach!” Pickman cried, trembling.

But Doresain’s fingers kept dipping into the berry juice, sketching lines across his chest and waist, lips following after, licking each trace clean. Juice vanished under his tongue, leaving only flushed skin marked with crimson welts.

He sighed softly, voice reverent.
“These lines… even better than I imagined.”

Pickman fumed, face crimson, torn between pushing him away and enduring it.
“This isn’t art! This is torture!”

“Torture?” Doresain’s chuckle was low, tinged with desire.
“Funny… I see nothing but honesty in you.”

His fingers tilted Pickman’s jaw again, careful yet unyielding, like adjusting a precious statue.

“For art’s sake, you understand?” Doresain whispered against his ear, breath hot and trembling with restraint. “You are my finest ingredient.”

Pickman’s grin twitched into madness, laughter bursting out like sparks.
“Ha… ingredient? What will you smear me with then—blood? Meat?” His words were mocking, but carried a sweet, feverish edge.

Doresain didn’t answer immediately. Instead, he leaned down, biting lightly at the curve of his collarbone—not savage, but like savoring a piece of delicate confection. His tongue traced the mark with reverence.

Pickman gasped sharply, body jolting. His laugh rose again, wild and broken.
“Hah… liar… you say it’s art, but really—you just want to eat me, don’t you?”

Doresain’s smile deepened—denial and admission blurred together. His teeth rested against Pickman’s throat, voice low and steady.
“To me, bringing out the finest of an ingredient is art. My dear Pickman.”
thread_title: doresain x pickman fan fic R18

content:
His weight pressed down, engulfing Pickman like a tide. It wasn’t violent, but inescapably intimate—gentle to the point of cruelty.

Pickman’s breaths quickened, his eyes glittering with both panic and childlike mischief. He looked terrified, yet also waiting for the next devouring touch. Laughter spilled from his lips, breaking into a whimper when Doresain’s mouth finally claimed his.

—

Breath tangled with breath, hot and consuming. Doresain’s restraint was razor-thin, his voice breaking lowly.

“I’ve held back for so long. Why haven’t you realized?”

Pickman blinked, utterly lost. “What are you talking about? I’m no good at riddles!”

“I like you, Pickman.”

The words landed heavy, stripping the air. Their breaths clashed in the narrow distance, heat wrapping tight around them.

Pickman’s eyes widened. “Wh—what? You’re joking, right?”

But Doresain’s gaze burned steady, unwavering.
“I rarely lie. Especially not to you.”

Pickman’s heart pounded, his voice stumbling out weakly.
“But… weren’t you punishing me? Why say you like me now?”

Doresain closed his eyes, fighting to leash himself. When he spoke, his voice was calm, but fire lay beneath.
“I crave not food… but you.”

Pickman jolted, panic and heat flushing through him. “That’s too weird! Why would you even like me?!”

Doresain’s smile curved faintly, bitter and tender at once.
“You’re so foolish it maddens me… and that is exactly why I can’t let you go.”

His forehead pressed to Pickman’s, breath scorching.
“I’ve waited long enough. Don’t make me endure anymore.”

Pickman’s body locked tight, his heart hammering. His words faltered, lost.

Doresain’s hand cupped his nape, trapping him in an embrace, breath mingling too close to bear.

Pickman whimpered, still trying to protest.
“You—you better not hurt me!”

Doresain’s chuckle rumbled low, lips brushing his ear.
“Relax. I’ll be careful. A gentleman always knows his measure.”
thread_title: doresain x pickman fan fic R18

content: Then his lips claimed Pickman’s once more—deep, relentless, stealing his breath until resistance crumbled.
thread_title: doresain x pickman fan fic R18

content:
The small bottle of clear oil had already been placed on the desk, as though Doresain had foreseen this moment. Under the flickering candlelight, he opened it, dipping his fingers.

Cool liquid touched the tight entrance, spreading with slick insistence.

“Ah—! Cold!” Pickman yelped, hips twitching away.

Doresain soothed him with a murmur, voice low against his ear.
“It will be warm soon.”

His slick fingers pressed slowly, patient as they worked past tense resistance. Pickman shivered violently, his body clenching reflexively, but Doresain never rushed—every motion careful, deliberate, meant to open him inch by inch.

When the first finger slid in, Pickman gasped, half protesting, half confused.
“Doresain… what are you doing…?”

Doresain merely gave a soft “mm,” his lips brushing against Pickman’s jaw, a kiss hiding the faint curve of his smile. His movements were painstakingly slow, as though treating the most precious of ingredients—one finger coaxing, letting the body adjust, before the second joined in. 

The slickness of oil made it easier, yet the intrusion still drew a raw tightness that made Pickman curl up, a low sound spilling from his throat.
“Not… too deep…”

Doresain silenced him with a kiss. His fingertips worked carefully within, gently scissoring, occasionally grazing over tender ridges that made Pickman shudder violently, his voice breaking apart.

“Relax… breathe…” Doresain whispered, his voice thick with restraint. Every word of comfort was like an artist soothing a trembling model, though the desire beneath his tone betrayed itself.

By the time a third finger entered, Pickman was drenched in sweat, panting, his eyes wet at the corners. “You… you’re a pervert… but I kind of like it…”

Doresain only smiled, his thumb wiping away the tears at the corner of Pickman’s eye. Oil glistened between his fingers, the entrance already softened and yielding.
thread_title: doresain x pickman fan fic R18

content:
At last, he withdrew his hand, palm sliding to Pickman’s waist as his voice dropped low:
“It’s ready… Now comes the true ‘meal.’”

Pickman, pressed against the center of the bed, flushed scarlet, breath ragged. “You—you better not go too far…”

Doresain leaned in, their foreheads touching, breaths mingling, his voice dark with heat.
“I’ve held back too long. Pickman, your obliviousness is driving me mad.”

And with that, he slowly pushed in.

“Ah—!” Pickman stiffened, clutching the sheets, tears welling at the corners of his eyes. “Wait—too sudden—!”

Doresain’s own body trembled at the joining, his breath catching. He stilled, voice hoarse with control:
“Relax… don’t be afraid. I’ll be gentle.”

He kissed Pickman’s brow, easing in with the patience of a sculptor, each motion deliberate, as though carving the most exquisite dish.

Pickman bit his lip, breath quickening, resistance melting into searing waves of sensation. His face flushed, voice trembling with sobs.
“You bastard… who told you to be this gentle…!”

He lashed a kick at Doresain, but the other only chuckled, lips closing over his ear.
“Do you want me to finish inside you?”

Pickman froze, blurting out without thinking, “Can ghouls even do that?”

“…Do you have one?” Doresain asked, puzzled. (A womb.)

“Of course not! I’m a man!”

“Then I’ll stay inside.”

The rhythm quickened. The bed creaked softly, candles flickered, the air heavy with the mingling of sweat and berries. Pickman’s voice broke, shifting from protests to fractured whimpers.

“Ha… ah… stop, stop… Doresain…!”

Doresain bent down and kissed him, swallowing every cry. His movements were deep, steady, as if pulling Pickman wholly into himself.

“You are my pursuit of art,” he murmured in the pauses, breath burning hot, “and my only desire.”

Pickman’s gaze blurred, tears mixing with sweat, still struggling to speak.
“This… this isn’t art… it’s torture…”
thread_title: doresain x pickman fan fic R18

content:
Doresain’s low laugh rumbled in his chest.
“Then drown in my torture.”

His pace grew urgent, pleasure crashing in waves. Pickman arched, nails clawing down Doresain’s back, leaving crimson trails. Blood welled from the scratches.

Doresain held him down, steady yet relentless. Each thrust forced Pickman’s body taut, his cries dissolving into ragged moans. At last, sharp fangs sank into his throat, drinking blood sweet as honey. The taste ignited him; his body shuddered violently as release overtook him.

Finally, with one last deep stroke, Pickman convulsed, a broken cry tearing from him as hot release spilled out, splattering across their skin. Warm liquid streaked down his stomach and chest, even dripping along his trembling hand.

Doresain didn’t stop immediately—he slowed, lowering his gaze to the mess glistening in candlelight. His breath was rough, desire barely veiled beneath that dreadful elegance.

When he pulled out, more liquid seeped free, soaking the sheets.

“…Is it over?” Pickman asked, dazed, absurdity clouding his exhaustion.

“Of course not. I haven’t finished dining. Lie still.”

Pickman tried to argue, but Doresain gave no room to escape. He lifted fingers smeared with release to his lips, drawing them in without hesitation. His tongue curled around the taste, savoring it as if sampling a fine wine.

Pickman stared, eyes wide in shock.

Doresain cleaned his hand with a soft click of his tongue, then lowered his mouth to Pickman’s soiled skin. He licked slowly over his abdomen, tracing every streak, his tongue hot and insistent, devouring every trace of whiteness until none remained.

Pickman panted harder, chest rising, shame and arousal tangled. He tried to push away but had no strength, trembling under that near-reverent worship.

Just as he thought it would end, something sharp brushed against him—cold, dangerous.
thread_title: doresain x pickman fan fic R18

content: “Ah—!” He jolted, looking down, only to see Doresain’s lips closed around him. The fangs never pierced, only grazed the surface of his arousal, sending shocks like lightning.
thread_title: doresain x pickman fan fic R18

content:
Pickman whimpered, nearly in tears. “Doresain! Don’t… don’t use your teeth—!”

But Doresain ignored him, dragging those sharp points with measured slowness, while his tongue teased the head with molten heat. The mix of danger and indulgence was unbearable.

“Relax,” came the soft command, “I won’t hurt you. Just lie still.”

Another graze, another shudder. Pickman arched, a broken cry escaping, tears spilling down his face. Shamefully, he felt release rising even faster from this perilous torment.

Catching it, Doresain’s smile deepened. Predator’s satisfaction at last.

The next moment, he took Pickman fully into his mouth, fangs brushing, tongue winding. Heat and sharpness entwined.

Pickman broke, screaming as his body seized, spilling into Doresain’s throat. The ghoul king swallowed without hesitation, as elegantly as one might raise a glass at table. He savored the salty taste, tongue swirling as if discerning the notes of a dish.

“Like a sauce fresh from the fire,” he murmured, near rapture, “so raw, so vivid… yours alone.”

Pickman flushed scarlet, staring in disbelief. Yet Doresain’s gaze was calm, reverent even—as though this was no debauchery, but a solemn tasting. To him, it was art itself.


---

Pickman collapsed back onto the bed, chest heaving, face aflame with both climax and shame. He turned his face away, like a sulking child, unwilling to meet Doresain’s eyes.

Doresain drew the sheets over his bare form, movements tender, almost doting. His lips curved with that inscrutable smile.

“Sleep,” he whispered, brushing damp hair from Pickman’s temple like soothing a frightened creature.
thread_title: doresain x pickman fan fic R18

content:
Pickman muttered faintly, “You… you’re always like this… I don’t even know what you want…”
His voice faded, swallowed by sleep.

Only the flicker of candlelight remained. Doresain gazed down at him, fingers drawing back, emotions coiling in shadowed depths.

The light painted him—elegant, restrained, yet saturated with a darkness that could not be hidden.
The night devoured all.


---
thread_title: doresain x pickman fan fic R18

content:
Next morning (a little epilogue):

Pickman: Why does my bottom ache so much?! And my back too!

Doresain: Already forgetting last night? The scratches on my back are still bleeding.

Pickman: Hey! That’s not my fault! You shoved that thing straight in—anyone would fight back!

Doresain: (sighs) I did prepare you with oil. Maybe you should stay home today, rest a little.
Pickman: No way! I need to paint! (Though he couldn’t even get up properly.)

Doresain: (smiling, walking away)

Pickman: What are you smiling at, Doresain?! Get back here!!!

(He had only gone to make breakfast.)

the end
